goal: Redesign + simplify the tarot personality quiz to the Claude Design 'Tarot Quiz Mobile' mockup: 3-view flow (intro / question / result), shortened to 5 fun questions, auto-advance on tap, segmented progress, trait chips, a screenshot-ready result share-card, save-to-profile, and Web Share.
done: Full rewrite of js/quiz-tarot-card-personality.js: 5 questions covering all 6 archetypes, scoreResult() with earliest-pick tie-break, 3-view show/hide, renderQuestion (progress + auto-advance with 220ms select feedback), renderResult (card art via getCardImageUrl, EN italic + TH gold name, summary, trait chips, watermark), saveResultToProfile() to localStorage 'meowtarot_personality_card' with signed-in vs device wording (getCurrentUser), share via navigator.share+clipboard, analytics via trackCtaClicked/trackShareClicked. New css/quiz.css (scoped body[data-page='quiz']) + .quiz-view[hidden] fix. Rebuilt both quiz HTML pages (EN + TH) with the 3-view markup, added quiz.css + font link, bumped script ?v=20260624.
verified: headless-chrome renders of intro/question/result match Tarot Quiz Mobile.dc.html; caught+fixed .quiz-view[hidden] bug during QA; node --check passes
